entries.title: Weekly control panel refresh completed
entries.text: Refreshed project health metrics, reviewed current blockers, and updated the next milestone dates for all tracked initiatives.

entries.title: Vendor follow-up draft prepared
entries.text: Prepared a clean follow-up list for external vendors and grouped missing items by owner so outreach can be done quickly next week.

entries.title: Timezone mismatch blocked analytics export
entries.text: Analytics export mixed UTC timestamps with local time fields, which broke the summary pipeline and blocked the personal analytics view.

entries.title: Policy draft archive cleanup
entries.text: Moved outdated policy drafts into the archive folder, updated naming conventions, and removed old references from the active list.

entries.title: Monthly scorecard outline started
entries.text: Created a working outline for the monthly scorecard with sections for metrics, narrative highlights, risks, and pending decisions.

entries.title: Kept dashboard data source local for first release
entries.text: Chose local JSON files for the first version so the site stays simple, fast to edit, and easy to deploy without backend infrastructure.
